name: apify-scraper
description: Full Apify web scraping platform integration — run Actors, manage datasets, key-value stores, schedules, webhooks, and tasks directly from Claude.

pillars.supervised: Human approval for Actor runs with external effects
pillars.secured: API token via env var, Zod input validation, pinned versions
pillars.agents: R=web-scraping, T=Apify API, M=datasets/KV stores, P=Actor-based execution
